case_title: TOMAS PENA VS. JOSE JESUS HERNANDEZ

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PENA, TOMAS DBA  LATIN JEWELERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, JOSE JESUS $1,388.58 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,458.58, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT.
